title: Forged in Iron, Bound for Glory
description: The 1st Armored Division, Iron Knights, expands into the world of Minecraft with their Official Mod!
body:
**My Fellow Knights!**

*We have fought long and hard, and our efforts have not been in vain.*
*To see our kingdom grow and thrive in such a supportive way has brought me great joy, and it is an absolute pleasure to announce that we will be expanding our reach beyond thought possible.*
*We shall expand our reach beyond, and expand the kingdom into other dimensions!*

*The Iron Knights Minecraft Mod is now out and available for download!*
*Playable on 1.20.1, this mod aims to add various references to our glorious faction. The EXO Armors, the Legendary Weapons, and the Ethereal Jungle are already create enough content to be impressive, yet I shall continue to go further and add more in the future!*
*We shall expand to a place no squid, no bot, and no bug could ever reach! So raise your pickaxes, and venture into this cubic world with a new goal in mind: To expand our Iron kingdom further beyond!*

**FORGED IN IRON, BOUND FOR GLORY!**
